name: The Flooded Mine
description: An old iron mine that has partially filled with groundwater. The entrance is a vertical shaft disappearing into the dark.

discovery.message: You find a rusted pulley system and a vertical shaft hidden by mountain scrub.

requirements.description: The shaft is too deep to climb. You need a rope to descend.

mine-shaft-bottom.text: You descend into the cool, damp air. The bottom is flooded with knee-high water. Two tunnels lead away from the shaft.

choices.label: Follow the tunnel with the rusted rail tracks.
Wade into the deeper water in the side passage.

track-tunnel.text: The tracks lead to a collapsed chamber. A skeletal miner lies under some rubble, a pickaxe still in hand.

miner-loot.text: Among the rubble, you see a patch of loose, sandy soil that looks out of place.

choices.label: Use a Shovel to dig into the sandy soil.
Go back to the shaft bottom.

hidden-ore-stash.text: You dig up a small wooden crate containing high-grade iron ore and some old coins.

water-passage.text: The water reaches your chest. You see something glinting at the bottom.
water-passage.success_text: You dive down and retrieve a heavy iron key from the muck.
water-passage.failure_text: The water is too cold and you struggle to stay afloat, losing your breath.

water-struggle.text: You gasp for air as you pull yourself back to the dry tracks. (Gained 1 Fatigue)

key-find-success.text: You've found a Heavy Iron Key. It might open something elsewhere.
